news.title: Samsung Confirms AI Smart Glasses Launch in 2026
news.summary: Samsung has confirmed the launch of AR smart glasses in 2026, featuring a 12MP camera, 155mAh battery, and Qualcomm’s AR1 chip.
news.content: Samsung’s EVP of Mobile Experiences, Seong Cho, announced during the company’s Q4 2025 earnings call that Samsung plans to launch wearable devices, including AR glasses, in 2026. The smart glasses are expected to offer multimodal AI experiences.

news.title: Apple Plans to Launch AI Smart Glasses by End of 2026
news.summary: Apple is developing AI smart glasses with capabilities such as environment analysis, call making, music playing, real-time translation, and navigation services.
news.content: According to Bloomberg, Apple plans to release smart glasses with a camera, microphone, and speaker in late 2026. The device will be able to execute voice commands through Siri and is seen as a competitor to Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses.

news.title: Nvidia Expects at Least a Trillion Dollars in Revenue Through Next Year
news.summary: Nvidia's CEO predicts significant revenue through next year, highlighting the company's advancements in AI chips.
news.content: Nvidia's chief, Jensen Huang, announced on Monday that the company, a powerhouse in artificial intelligence chips, expects to generate at least a trillion dollars in revenue through next year.

news.title: ASRock Industrial Launches AI BOX-A395 System
news.summary: ASRock Industrial has announced the AI BOX-A395, integrating CPU, GPU, and NPU resources for AI applications.
news.content: ASRock Industrial has unveiled the AI BOX-A395, a compact system based on the AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395 platform. This system is designed to cater to AI applications by integrating CPU, GPU, and NPU resources.

news.title: Huawei's Latest Smart Watch Features Health Monitoring Technology
news.summary: Huawei introduces a new smart watch with advanced health monitoring capabilities, including heart rate and blood oxygen level tracking.
news.content: Huawei has launched its latest smart watch, which includes features such as heart rate monitoring and blood oxygen level tracking, enhancing its health monitoring technology.

news.title: Rokid Introduces New AR Glasses for Enterprise Use
news.summary: Rokid, a leading AR technology company, has introduced new AR glasses designed specifically for enterprise applications.
news.content: Rokid has announced the launch of its new AR glasses tailored for enterprise use, marking a significant step in the company's expansion into the business sector.

news.title: Zephyr RTOS Reaches Major Milestone with New Release
news.summary: The Zephyr project has released a new version of its RTOS, focusing on improved security and real-time performance.
news.content: The Zephyr project, a leading real-time operating system for embedded systems, has announced a new release that includes enhancements in security and real-time performance.

news.title: 涂鸦智能 Expands AI Ecosystem with New Partnerships
news.summary: Tuya Smart, a global AI+IoT platform, has announced new partnerships to expand its AI ecosystem, offering more integrated smart home solutions.
news.content: Tuya Smart, known for its AI+IoT platform, has revealed new partnerships aimed at broadening its AI ecosystem. These collaborations will allow for more comprehensive smart home solutions.

news.title: New Open-Source Edge AI System Raises Security Concerns
news.summary: An open-source edge AI system called RuView is turning WiFi infrastructure into a through-wall human-sensing platform, sparking security and surveillance debates.
news.content: RuView, a new open-source edge AI system, is capable of turning ordinary WiFi infrastructure into a through-wall human-sensing platform. This development has raised urgent concerns regarding security and surveillance.
